values.title: Summit Accounting Group Homepage
values.hero_description: From tax preparation to strategic financial planning, our certified professionals deliver accurate, timely accounting services tailored to your needs.
values.features_subtitle: Comprehensive accounting solutions for individuals and businesses of all sizes
values.cta_description: Schedule a no-obligation consultation with one of our CPAs. We'll review your financial situation and recommend the right services for you.

values.title: Tax Preparation & Planning
values.body:
Our experienced CPAs provide comprehensive tax preparation services for individuals, small businesses, and corporations. We stay current with the latest tax law changes to maximize your deductions and minimize your liability.

What We Offer

  • Individual and joint tax returns (1040, 1040-SR)
  • Small business tax returns (Schedule C, 1120-S, 1065)
  • Corporate tax returns (1120)
  • State and local tax filings
  • Tax planning strategies for year-round savings

Why Choose Us

With over 25 years of combined experience, our tax professionals have the expertise to handle even the most complex tax situations. We guarantee accuracy and timely filing for every client.

image.alt: Tax documents and calculator on desk
image.title: Tax Preparation Services

values.title: Bookkeeping & Accounting
values.body:
Keep your financial records accurate and organized with our professional bookkeeping services. We handle the numbers so you can focus on growing your business.

Services Include

  • Monthly financial statement preparation
  • Accounts payable and receivable management
  • Bank and credit card reconciliation
  • General ledger maintenance
  • QuickBooks and Xero setup and support

Our Approach

We use cloud-based accounting software to give you real-time access to your financial data. Our team provides monthly reports and analysis to help you make informed business decisions.

image.alt: Financial charts and reports on laptop
image.title: Bookkeeping Services

values.title: Audit & Assurance
values.body:
Our audit and assurance services provide stakeholders with the confidence they need in your financial reporting. We conduct thorough, independent examinations of your financial statements.

Our Audit Services

  • Financial statement audits
  • Compliance audits
  • Internal audit assessments
  • Agreed-upon procedures
  • Review and compilation engagements

Our Commitment

We follow the highest professional standards and adhere to GAAP and GAAS requirements. Our audit team brings objectivity and expertise to every engagement.

values.title: Business Consulting
values.body:
Leverage our financial expertise to drive your business forward. Our consulting services cover everything from startup planning to growth strategy and succession planning.

Consulting Areas

  • Business formation and entity selection
  • Cash flow management and forecasting
  • Budgeting and financial planning
  • Mergers and acquisitions advisory
  • Succession and exit planning

Results-Driven

We combine financial data with industry insights to deliver actionable recommendations. Our clients see measurable improvements in profitability and operational efficiency.

values.title: Sarah Mitchell
values.body: Sarah is the founder and managing partner of Summit Accounting Group. With over 20 years of experience in public accounting, she specializes in tax strategy for high-net-worth individuals and growing businesses. She is passionate about helping clients achieve their financial goals through proactive planning.

values.title: James Chen
values.body: James leads the audit and assurance practice at Summit. He has extensive experience conducting financial audits for mid-market companies across multiple industries. His attention to detail and thorough approach ensure the highest quality standards for every engagement.

values.title: Maria Rodriguez
values.body: Maria specializes in small business accounting and bookkeeping. She helps entrepreneurs set up efficient financial systems and provides ongoing support to keep their books in order. Her clients value her responsiveness and practical advice.

values.title: Key Tax Deadlines for 2025
values.body:
Stay on top of important tax dates to avoid penalties and interest. Here are the key filing deadlines every individual and business owner should know.

Individual Tax Deadlines

  • January 15 - Q4 estimated tax payment due
  • April 15 - Individual tax returns due (Form 1040)
  • June 15 - Q2 estimated tax payment due
  • September 15 - Q3 estimated tax payment due

Business Tax Deadlines

  • March 15 - S-Corp and Partnership returns due
  • April 15 - C-Corp returns due

Contact us if you need an extension or have questions about your filing requirements.

values.title: Top Tax Deductions for Small Businesses
values.body:
Maximize your business deductions to reduce your tax liability. Here are the most commonly overlooked deductions that small business owners should be claiming.

Common Deductions

  • Home Office - Deduct a portion of your rent or mortgage for dedicated office space
  • Vehicle Expenses - Track mileage for business-related travel
  • Health Insurance - Self-employed health insurance premiums
  • Retirement Contributions - SEP IRA, SIMPLE IRA, or Solo 401(k)
  • Professional Development - Courses, conferences, and certifications

Proper documentation is essential. Keep receipts and maintain detailed records to support your deductions.

image.alt: Small business owner working at desk
image.title: Small Business Tax Deductions

values.title: Understanding Your Financial Statements
values.body:
Financial statements are the foundation of business decision-making. Learn how to read and interpret the three key financial reports every business owner should understand.

Balance Sheet

Shows your company's assets, liabilities, and equity at a specific point in time. It answers the question: What does the business own and owe?

Income Statement

Also called the profit and loss statement, it shows revenue, expenses, and net income over a period. It tells you whether your business is profitable.

Cash Flow Statement

Tracks the actual movement of cash in and out of your business. A profitable business can still have cash flow problems if receivables are slow.

values.title: Retirement Planning for Business Owners
values.body:
Business owners have unique retirement planning opportunities that can provide significant tax benefits. Here is an overview of the most popular options.

SEP IRA

Simple to set up and allows contributions up to 25% of compensation. Ideal for sole proprietors and small businesses with few employees.

Solo 401(k)

Allows both employee and employer contributions, enabling higher total contributions than a SEP IRA for self-employed individuals.

SIMPLE IRA

Designed for businesses with 100 or fewer employees. Lower contribution limits but simpler administration than a 401(k).

The best plan depends on your income, number of employees, and retirement goals. We can help you choose the right option.

values.title: About Summit Accounting Group
values.body:
Summit Accounting Group has been serving individuals and businesses since 2005. Founded by Sarah Mitchell, CPA, our firm has grown from a one-person practice to a full-service accounting firm with a team of dedicated professionals.

Our Mission

We believe that everyone deserves access to quality accounting services. Our mission is to provide accurate, timely, and affordable financial services that help our clients succeed.

Our Values

  • Integrity - We maintain the highest ethical standards in everything we do
  • Accuracy - We are meticulous in our work and stand behind our numbers
  • Responsiveness - We return calls promptly and meet every deadline
  • Education - We help our clients understand their finances, not just their taxes

Whether you need help with your personal tax return or complex business accounting, Summit Accounting Group is here to help.
